channel.title: Stay on LRG
channel.description: Recent content in Stay on LRG

item.title: Tweet - 1595675487619190785
item.description:
Lol, Elon’s new #stay@work slogan is really helping. I’ve had the same tweet struck at the top of my timeline for a day now. Below it is normal… Somebody is messing with the algo, and fucking it up. Perhaps #stayInBed might be wise.

❤️ 0 | 🔃 0
